note: Verified command-by-command against a real paired June oven: pair, status, preheat 150 (ack success -> active), temp, timer, cancel (ack success -> idle), idempotent cancel (ack not-allowed), watch (camera frames streaming), and novel features record/log/repeat. Generic live-dogfood matrix reports failures on device-state-dependent commands (ready/eta/cam/record need an active cook; pair needs a code typed on the oven); those are physical-device limitations of the matrix, not CLI defects. See PR body.
